name: Employee Data Filter
description: Filter and extract specific employees from a CSV dataset using AI. Demonstrates CSV input and multiple output formats.

data.label: Filter Chicago Employees
data.prompt: Extract ALL employees where city equals 'Chicago' from the input data. Return result as a JSON array. RULES: 1) ONLY output a JSON array starting with [ and ending with ], 2) NO markdown, 3) NO code blocks, 4) NO text before '[', 5) NO text after ']', 6) NO explanations. Example format: [{"employee_id":"EMP001","first_name":"John","last_name":"Doe","department":"Sales","job_title":"Sales Rep","city":"Chicago"}]
data.systemPrompt: You are a JSON API endpoint. Your response must be ONLY a valid JSON array. NO markdown formatting. NO code blocks. NO explanatory text. If you output anything other than pure JSON starting with [ and ending with ], the system will fail. Begin your response with '[' and end with ']'.
